title: Senior Software Quality Engineer (AI-Accelerated) - Jetpac
company_stage: Series B+ (backed by Peak XV, Warburg Pincus, Founders Fund, EDBI)
company_focus:
Global telco SaaS platform and travel tech solutions
including eSIM roaming
description:
Founded in 2014, Circles is a global technology company
reimagining the telco industry with its innovative SaaS
platform, empowering telco operators worldwide to
effortlessly launch innovative digital brands or refresh
existing ones, accelerating their transformation into
techcos.

Today, Circles partners with leading telco operators across
multiple countries and continents, including KDDI
Corporation, Etisalat Group (e&), AT&T, and Telkomsel,
creating blueprints for future telco and digital experiences
enjoyed by millions of consumers globally.

Besides its SaaS business, Circles operates three other
distinct businesses:

- Circles.Life: A wholly-owned digital lifestyle telco brand
  based in Singapore, Circles.Life is powered by Circles’
  SaaS platform and pioneering go-to-market strategies. It
  is the digital market leader in Singapore and has won
  numerous awards for marketing, customer service, and
  innovative product offerings beyond connectivity.

- Circles Aspire: A global provider of Communications
  Platform-as-a-Service (CPaaS) solutions. Its cloud-based
  Experience Cloud platform enables enterprises, service
  providers and developers to deliver and scale mobile,
  messaging, IoT, and connectivity services worldwide.

- Jetpac: Specializing in travel tech solutions, Jetpac
  provides seamless eSIM roaming for over 200 destinations
  and innovative travel lifestyle products, redefining
  connectivity for digital travelers. Jetpac was awarded
  Travel eSIM of the Year.

Circles is backed by renowned global investors, including
Peak XV Partners (formerly Sequoia), Warburg Pincus,
Founders Fund, and EDBI (the investment arm of the Singapore
Economic Development Board), with a track record of backing
industry challengers.

Senior Software Quality Engineer (AI-Accelerated)

Company: Circles – Jetpac Type: Full‑time

About Jetpac Jetpac, from Circles, is building a seamless
way for travelers to stay connected globally. We offer eSIMs
across 200+ destinations with a fast-growing consumer
platform spanning web, mobile, and partner channels
targeting the travel essentials segment.

We operate as a high-velocity product team. Small teams,
fast decisions, and direct ownership. We ship continuously,
iterate quickly, and measure what matters.

The Role

We’ve reached meaningful scale and are rebuilding key parts
of the platform to support the next phase of growth. You’ll
work closely with engineers, product, design, and business
teams to deliver foundational capabilities that unlock
entire categories of product development.

The way software is tested has fundamentally changed. Static
test cases and manual QA don’t scale in AI-assisted
development environments.

This role focuses on building AI-accelerated testing systems
that generate, execute, and validate tests at speed.

You’ll work across backend and platform systems to ensure
quality through:

- AI assisted test generation
- fast and reliable execution
- pragmatic validation approaches

This is not a traditional QA role. You are building systems
that ensure quality by design, not inspection.

What You’ll Do

Build and operate systems that make testing scalable, fast,
and largely automated across backend, web, and mobile.

- Build AI-assisted test generation systems from APIs to user
  flows (web + app)
- Design and maintain fast, parallel test execution pipelines
  integrated into CI/CD
- Implement smart validation approaches beyond strict
  assertions where needed
- Build and maintain end-to-end test coverage across critical
  user journeys
- Generate high-quality synthetic test data and scenarios,
  including multi-product flows
- Ensure tests are high-signal, low-flake, and easy for
  developers to trust
- Improve coverage across frontend, backend, and app layers
  without increasing manual effort

Focus areas include:

- Web and mobile app user flows (browse, cart, checkout,
  payments)
- API and backend validation supporting these flows
- Multi-entity scenarios (bundles, rewards, pricing)
- Test execution performance and reliability

Required Skills and Experience

3–5 years of experience in software quality engineering,
SDET, or test infrastructure roles Strong programming skills
with experience building automated testing systems, not just
writing test cases

Hands-on experience with using AI-assisted workflows for
test generation or automation, including:

- Frontend and app testing (web and/or mobile)
- End-to-end and integration testing across real user journeys
- API and service-level validation
- Building or working with test frameworks and execution
  pipelines
- Generating test cases, edge cases, and flows using
  LLMs/tools in Python
- Reviewing, refining, and productionizing AI-generated tests
- Ensuring outputs are stable, repeatable, and high-signal

Strong understanding of:

- Testing distributed systems and multi-layer architectures
- Mocking, stubbing, and service isolation
- Test data setup and management
- Debugging failures across frontend, backend, and app layers
- Observability and debugging tools
- Performance or load testing basics

Example Projects You’ll Work On

- Build an AI-assisted system to generate test coverage for
  Frontend applications, Mobile App, APIs and backend
  services
- Design a fast, parallel test execution pipeline that scales
  with product complexity
- Create validation layers for cart and checkout flows across
  multiple product types
- Generate synthetic datasets to test edge cases in pricing,
  rewards, and promotions
- Improve reliability and reduce flakiness across existing
  automated test suites

What Success Looks Like

- Test coverage increases without proportional manual effort
- Test execution is fast, reliable, and trusted by engineers
- Bugs are caught early through strong automated validation
- Developers ship faster because testing is not a bottleneck

Hiring Process

- Technical Intro Conversation with CTO
- Live Practical Assignment (focused on test systems + AI
  usage)

Why Jetpac

- High ownership, low bureaucracy
- Real product impact at global scale
- Fast-moving team with strong engineering culture
- Flexible work setup across global teams

Circles is committed to a diverse and inclusive workplace.
We are an equal opportunity employer and do not discriminate
on the basis of race, national origin, gender, disability or
age.

Data Protection and Privacy Statement

By submitting an application for this position, you, as the
applicant, or your authorised representative(s), consent to
Circles’ Candidate Data Protection and Privacy Policy. You
also agree to the collection, use, and/or disclosure of your
personal data by us solely for recruitment purposes as
specified in the Policy. You acknowledge that you have read
and understood the Policy, are aware of your rights
regarding your personal data, and accept the terms relating
to international data transfers, where applicable. You
further understand that you may withdraw consent at any
time, which may affect our ability to consider your
application. In instances where your personal data or
application is submitted by a third party, it is understood
that such third party has been duly authorised by you to
disclose the relevant personal data and provide consent on
your behalf, and that you have been made aware of this
Policy.

To all recruitment agencies: Circles will only acknowledge
resumes shared by recruitment agencies if selected in our
preferred supplier partnership program.

Please do not forward resumes to our jobs alias, Circles,
employees or any other company location. Circles will not be
held accountable for any fees related to unsolicited resumes
not uploaded via our ATS.
responsibilities: Build AI-assisted test generation systems from APIs to user flows across web and mobile platforms
Design and maintain fast, parallel test execution pipelines integrated into CI/CD
Implement smart validation approaches beyond strict assertions for complex testing scenarios
Build and maintain end-to-end test coverage across critical user journeys
Generate high-quality synthetic test data and scenarios including multi-product flows
Ensure tests are high-signal, low-flake, and trusted by developers
Improve coverage across frontend, backend, and app layers without increasing manual effort
use_cases: AI-assisted test generation for web and mobile user flows
Automated testing for e-commerce flows (browse, cart, checkout, payments)
API and backend service validation for telco/travel platform
Synthetic data generation for pricing, rewards, and promotions testing
Multi-entity scenario testing for bundles and complex product configurations
ai_classification_reasoning:
This role focuses on building AI-assisted testing systems
that use LLMs to generate, execute, and validate tests. The
role explicitly involves generating test cases using
LLMs/tools in Python and working with AI-assisted workflows
for test generation, which is direct hands-on work with AI
models and tools.
